title: zanthoxylum kauaense var. tenuifolium
intro: Zanthoxylum kauaense var. tenuifolium, also known as the Kaua'i prickly ash, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, characterized by its unique combination of fragrant and medicinal properties. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. Traditional uses of Kaua'i prickly ash include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and promote digestion, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Zanthoxylum kauaense var. tenuifolium include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
